title: Borokii Council of Elders
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Council of Elders}}
The '''Borokii Council of Elders''' was the ruling group of the [[Borokii]] overclan of the [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] [[Alwari]]. It consisted of twelve old [[Gender/Legends|female]] and male Borokii who were guarded by handpicked warriors of the tribe. The Council sat in an intricately decorated meetinghouse. Each of the Borokii subclans had a representative; that of the [[Situng Borokii]] was female. After peace was established with the [[Januul]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the Borokii Council became a part of the [[Council of Alwari Elders]].

==Appearances==
